Turns out she's married. Whoever married her must be the happiest man in this god damned world. I actually talked to her yesterday to arrange a lunch meeting, hesitated for a few hours before finally sending her a message. My heart was racing but I knew I have to do it, for all the promises I made here and to myself. The memory of love came back as we were exchanging text, and it's the most exciting moment I had in the past 2 years. I used to quote 「天下無心外之物，如此花樹在深山中自開自落，於我心亦何相關？」as a joke, now I finally understand it's meaning. Before I talked to her, she's a fictional character to me. Everything I know of her could be as wild and delusional as my imagination to be. After I actually talked to her, she's a real person with her unique personality - humorous and down to earth. I was going to flirt with her a bit in our lunch meeting, but now that I know she has a husband, I'll maintain my professional appearance as in a business setting. I made a promise to myself not to participate in anything '非君子所為'. So this is it, an ordinary story with an ordinary ending, mixed with a bit of disappointment and sadness, that were fortunate enough to be ended before escalate. If anything, it means that I don't read people wrong; She's happily married, which I suspect playing a considerate part to why she's so joyous and enjoyable. I'll cried myself to sleep tonight, and wake up to be my best self. I won't lower my standard, but next time I see a girl as awesome as her, you bet that I won't forgo my opportunity.
